# Ospemifene 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ospemifene 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ospemifene</strong> 目前有 <strong>8 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ospemifene 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Senshio is indicated for the treatment of moderate to severe symptomatic vulvar and vaginal atrophy (VVA) in post-menopausal women.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>leprosy（99.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（99.0%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（98.8%）</li>
<li>migraine with or without aura, susceptibility to（98.7%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（98.5%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（98.3%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（98.0%）</li>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（97.4%）</li>
<li>atrophoderma vermiculata（97.2%）</li>
<li>ulerythema ophryogenesis（96.8%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（96.6%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（96.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension, primary, autosomal recessive（96.4%）</li>
<li>colobomatous microphthalmia-rhizomelic dysplasia syndrome（96.2%）</li>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（96.1%）</li>
<li>persistent Mullerian duct syndrome（95.8%）</li>
<li>anomalous left coronary artery from the pulmonary artery（95.8%）</li>
<li>obsolete patella aplasia, coxa vara, and tarsal synostosis（95.6%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（95.5%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（95.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ospemifene/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
